texto: No one is born poor. People choose to become and remain poor. No one became wealthy from begging. Only people who have set limits on themselves do that. No one became wealthy from living off handouts. This is not the will of God for anyone. No one became wealthy from foraging in people’s bins. Only rats do that. You can excel and make money where you are without running helter skelter in search of green pastures.
explicacao: Citação de Uyoyou C. Charles-Iyoha sobre temas ligados a vida. “No one is born poor. People choose to become and remain poor. No one became wealthy from begging.…” articula vida, billions, rich em registro de vida, com relevância para contextos como rich e wealth.
